members.label: lamp
members.description: Table lamp on left nightstand with fabric shade
members.long_form_open_description: Traditional style lamp with a turned base and beige fabric shade producing warm light that casts a soft glow on the headboard and wall. Positioned on the left nightstand close to the headboard.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on the left nightstand immediately adjacent to the headboard.

members.label: lamp
members.description: table lamp with beige fabric shade on top of nightstand, currently lit
members.long_form_open_description: Traditional-style table lamp with a turned wood or bronze base and a beige/tan tapered fabric shade. The lamp is switched on, casting warm light upward onto the wall and downward onto the nightstand surface.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Sits on the nightstand, slightly toward the back center of the top surface, casting light onto the wall behind
